series_metadata.series_description: File maintained per OAC 123:1-49-14 to maintain compliance with Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) regulations. Can include, but may not be limited to, EEO discrimination complaint form and receipt notification, investigative report, investigative questionnaire, evidentiary material, and documentation of findings/determination.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 5 years after resolution ; Electronic: 5 years after resolution, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
